label: Remove if other hediff comp
description: Removes this hediff when another hediff is absent or below a severity threshold.

Class.label: Properties class
Class.description: C# HediffCompProperties type for this list item.

otherHediff.label: Other hediff
otherHediff.description: Hediff whose absence causes removal of this hediff.

onlyIfOtherHediffSeverityBelow.label: Only if other hediff severity below
onlyIfOtherHediffSeverityBelow.description: Only remove if other hediff severity is below this.
